settings.name: search
settings.label: Search label
settings.help: Label for the search control (e.g. accessibility / UI text)

settings.name: search_placeholder
settings.label: Search placeholder
settings.help: Placeholder text inside the search input

settings.name: debounce_s
settings.label: Debounce (s)
settings.help: Seconds to wait after typing before searching

settings.name: min_chars
settings.label: Min characters
settings.help: Minimum characters before a search runs

settings.name: purge
settings.label: Search purge
settings.help: Deletes all cached search HTML under cache/search/ (definition panel cache for the search module)

settings.name: include_pages
settings.label: Include pages
settings.help: Include normal CMS pages in frontend results

settings.name: include_all_fields
settings.label: All fields
settings.help: Yes = match any panel field value (like admin search). No = only fields with search weight 1–3 in definitions

settings.name: include_lists
settings.label: Include lists
settings.help: List types to include in frontend search. Empty = no list items. Add one row per list.
